title: Software Update - DFU - Entering airplane mode during update
scenario: Verify that a DFU update fails gracefully when airplane mode is enabled during the update, and recovers successfully after retrying once airplane mode is turned off.
steps: Put the mobile device into airplane mode during 0-20% (or 0-10% if updating headset and charge case/stand simultaneously).
expected: After some time, the update should fail and the "Houston..." page should be displayed. Then, after turning off airplane mode and clicking "Retry", the update should restart and finish successfully.
